subject: international_economic
note: Seed list — add more concepts via extract_concepts.py from your PDFs

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 成员方给予任何第三方的优惠，须立即无条件给予其他成员方
concepts.brief_definition_en: Granting any advantage given to one trading partner immediately and unconditionally to all other WTO members
concepts.subject: international_economic

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 进口产品一旦过关，在税收和规制上不得低于同类国内产品所受待遇
concepts.brief_definition_en: Imported goods, once cleared customs, must receive treatment no less favorable than like domestic products
concepts.subject: international_economic

concepts.brief_definition_zh: WTO成员承诺不超过谈判确定的最高关税税率，提供贸易可预期性
concepts.brief_definition_en: WTO members' commitment not to raise tariffs above negotiated ceiling rates, ensuring trade predictability
concepts.subject: international_economic

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 针对以低于正常价值出口的商品实施的额外关税措施
concepts.brief_definition_en: Additional duties imposed on imports sold at prices below their normal value in the exporting country
concepts.subject: international_economic

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 抵消进口产品所获得的政府补贴影响的进口关税措施
concepts.brief_definition_en: Import duties offsetting the benefit of government subsidies received by foreign producers
concepts.subject: international_economic

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 在进口急剧增加对国内产业造成严重损害时暂时限制进口的例外措施
concepts.brief_definition_en: Temporary import restrictions applied when surging imports cause or threaten serious injury to domestic industry
concepts.subject: international_economic

concepts.brief_definition_zh: WTO通过专家组和上诉机构解决成员贸易争端的准司法性程序
concepts.brief_definition_en: The quasi-judicial WTO procedure for resolving trade disputes through panels and the Appellate Body
concepts.subject: international_economic

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 要求WTO成员对知识产权提供最低保护标准的多边协议
concepts.brief_definition_en: The WTO agreement requiring member states to provide minimum standards of intellectual property protection
concepts.subject: international_economic

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 规范服务贸易市场准入与国民待遇的多边协定，采用正面清单方法
concepts.brief_definition_en: The multilateral agreement governing trade in services market access and national treatment, using a positive list approach
concepts.subject: international_economic

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 两国间保护外国投资者在对方国家投资的国际协议
concepts.brief_definition_en: A treaty between two states providing reciprocal protection for investments of each state's nationals in the other's territory
concepts.subject: international_economic

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 投资条约中保护投资者合法期望，防止东道国恣意行为的核心标准
concepts.brief_definition_en: The investment treaty standard protecting investors' legitimate expectations and guarding against host state arbitrariness
concepts.subject: international_economic

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 国家合法征收外资须及时、充分、有效补偿；间接征收认定是核心争议
concepts.brief_definition_en: States may expropriate foreign investments if prompt, adequate, and effective compensation is paid; indirect expropriation is contested
concepts.subject: international_economic

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 允许外国投资者直接对东道国提起仲裁的机制，引发主权与改革争议
concepts.brief_definition_en: The mechanism allowing foreign investors to bring arbitration claims directly against host states, sparking sovereignty concerns
concepts.subject: international_economic

concepts.name_zh: 国际投资争端解决中心
concepts.brief_definition_zh: 世界银行附属机构，专为国际投资仲裁提供程序规则和行政支持
concepts.brief_definition_en: The World Bank affiliate providing institutional framework and procedural rules for international investment arbitration
concepts.subject: international_economic

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 东道国须积极采取合理措施保护外国投资者免受物理损害
concepts.brief_definition_en: The host state's obligation to actively take reasonable measures to protect foreign investment from physical harm
concepts.subject: international_economic

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 将东道国在投资合同中的义务提升为国际法义务的投资条约条款
concepts.brief_definition_en: A treaty provision elevating host state contractual commitments to investors into international law obligations
concepts.subject: international_economic

concepts.name_zh: 最惠国条款（投资法语境）
concepts.brief_definition_zh: 投资条约中允许投资者援引第三条约更有利条款的争议性条款
concepts.brief_definition_en: The contested investment treaty provision potentially allowing investors to import more favorable provisions from third treaties
concepts.subject: international_economic

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 投资者基于东道国明示或默示承诺形成的合理商业预期受条约保护
concepts.brief_definition_en: Reasonable commercial expectations formed on the basis of host state representations, protected by FET standard
concepts.subject: international_economic

concepts.brief_definition_zh: WTO赋予发展中国家过渡期、灵活性和能力建设的一揽子优惠安排
concepts.brief_definition_en: WTO provisions granting developing countries longer implementation periods, flexibilities, and capacity-building assistance
concepts.subject: international_economic

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 发达国家单方面给予发展中国家出口优惠关税的非互惠安排
concepts.brief_definition_en: A non-reciprocal arrangement by developed countries granting preferential tariffs to developing country exports
concepts.subject: international_economic

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 国家拥有的投资基金进行跨境投资引发的监管与国家安全问题
concepts.brief_definition_en: State-owned investment vehicles making cross-border investments, raising regulatory and national security concerns
concepts.subject: international_economic

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 两个或多个国家间削减关税与非关税壁垒的优惠贸易安排
concepts.brief_definition_en: A preferential trade arrangement between two or more states reducing tariffs and non-tariff barriers between them
concepts.subject: international_economic

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 支撑国际贸易与支付的汇率安排、国际储备与资金流动的体系
concepts.brief_definition_en: The framework of exchange rate arrangements, international reserves, and payment flows supporting global trade
concepts.subject: international_economic

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 国家通过干预外汇市场使本币贬值以获取不公平贸易优势的行为
concepts.brief_definition_en: State intervention in exchange markets to depreciate the currency and gain unfair trade advantage
concepts.subject: international_economic

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 将发展视为所有人民和国家不可剥夺的权利的宣言性国际法概念
concepts.brief_definition_en: The declaratory international law concept treating development as an inalienable right of all peoples and states
key_thinkers: UN Declaration on Right to Development
concepts.subject: international_economic

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 贸易自由化与环境保护之间的张力，通过WTO例外条款与多边环境协定协调
concepts.brief_definition_en: The tension between trade liberalization and environmental protection, mediated through WTO exceptions and MEAs
concepts.subject: international_economic

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 即使另一成员未违反具体规定，若其措施削减了合法贸易预期利益，亦可提起争端
concepts.brief_definition_en: A WTO dispute claim even absent a violation, when a measure nullifies or impairs negotiated tariff concession benefits
concepts.subject: international_economic

concepts.brief_definition_zh: 简化海关手续、提高边境通关效率以降低贸易成本的制度改革
concepts.brief_definition_en: Reforms simplifying customs procedures and border clearance to reduce trade transaction costs
concepts.subject: international_economic
